summary: Packet cites evidence labels without usable handles, breaking traceability and requiring artifact revision before live use.

findings.title: Missing evidence handle for traceability
findings.summary: Evidence label A lacks a usable handle, preventing auditability and violating traceability requirements.

findings.title: Opaque evidence handle requires caller retrieval
findings.summary: Evidence label B uses an opaque handle that still requires caller-owned retrieval to verify.

decision.summary: Packet cites evidence labels without usable handles, breaking traceability and requiring artifact revision before live use.
